# TheirStack

## Documentation

### teams

- [Users and Teams](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/teams.md): Learn about users and teams in TheirStack — how to create and manage teams, invite members, assign roles, and share billing plans, saved searches, and company lists.

### what-is-theirstack

- [What is TheirStack](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/what-is-theirstack.md):  

### datasets

- [Accessing your datasets](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets/accessing-datasets.md): Learn the different mechanisms to access TheirStack datasets — including direct download URLs for quick access and S3 bucket credentials for full historical data exploration.
- [Datasets](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets.md): Access complete jobs, technographics, and company datasets — delivered as CSV or Parquet, with historical coverage and optional daily updates via S3.
- [Buying Intents](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets/options/buying-intent.md): Complete reference for buying intent dataset fields — explore every option for tracking company purchase signals and technology adoption through job postings
- [Company Dataset](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets/options/company.md): Learn about the dictionary of the Companies Dataset — explore all available fields, data types, and descriptions for company records including domain, industry, size, and location data.
- [Job Dataset](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets/options/job.md): Explore all 60 job dataset fields including column names, data types, descriptions, and fill rates showing data completeness metrics for each field
- [Technographics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/datasets/options/technographic.md): Complete reference for 41 technographic fields tracking company technology adoption through job postings, including v2 schema and migration guide from v1

### mcp

- [MCP](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/mcp.md): Search job postings, company technographics, and hiring data directly from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client. TheirStack's MCP server gives AI assistants access to millions of jobs and tech stack data.

### guides

- [Guides](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides.md): Step-by-step tutorials to help you find leads, monitor competitors, automate job tracking, and seamlessly integrate TheirStack into your workflows.
- [Adding a technology or job filter to your company search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/adding-technology-filter-to-search.md): Learn how to add a technology or job filter to your company search in TheirStack, enabling you to find companies based on specific tools they use or positions they are hiring for.
- [How to backfill a job board with TheirStack](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/backfill-job-board.md): Step-by-step guide to backfilling your job board using TheirStack webhooks, API, or datasets — with field mapping, deduplication tips, and best practices for job board operators.
- [How to fetch jobs periodically using the Jobs API](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/fetch-jobs-periodically.md): This guide demonstrates how to fetch jobs periodically from the TheirStack API, ensuring fresh data, avoiding duplicates, and minimizing API credit costs.
- [How to Automate Your Ad Chase as a Recruiting Agency](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-automate-ad-chase-recruiting-agency.md): Learn how to automate ad chase — the process of monitoring job postings to find companies actively hiring and reach out before competitors. Set up filters, alerts, and workflows with TheirStack.
- [How to Avoid Downloading the Same Companies Twice](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-avoid-downloading-same-companies-twice.md): Learn how to deduplicate your company exports month over month by duplicating your company list and using it as an exclusion filter in TheirStack.
- [How to Build a Targeted Lead List Using Technographic Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-build-lead-lists-with-technographic-data.md): Step-by-step guide to building targeted sales lead lists by filtering companies based on their tech stack using TheirStack's 32k+ technology database.
- [How to Check if a Technology or Keyword Is Available](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-check-if-a-technology-is-available.md): Learn how to find out whether TheirStack tracks a specific technology or buying intent keyword, download the full catalogs, use job description search as a workaround, and request new keywords through the Support Center.
- [How to Choose the Best Way to Access TheirStack Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-choose-best-way-to-access-theirstack-data.md): Guidance to help you choose the most suitable way to access TheirStack data (App, API, Webhooks, or Datasets) for your use case, scale, and freshness needs—without prescribing a single path.
- [How to create a niche job newsletter with TheirStack MCP](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-create-niche-job-newsletter-with-mcp.md): Learn how to create a weekly curated job newsletter using Claude.ai and TheirStack MCP. Automate job newsletter creation with a reusable template — no code needed.
- [How to Discover Any Company's Tech Stack](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-discover-tech-stack-of-any-company.md): Step-by-step guide to finding what technologies any company uses — from backend infrastructure to internal tools — using TheirStack's job-posting-based technographic data.
- [How to Enrich a Company List with Technographic Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-enrich-companies-with-technographic-data.md): Step-by-step guide to enriching your company lists with technographic data on TheirStack — from manual CSV uploads to automated API integration for CRM and sales workflows.
- [How to Exclude Specific Companies from a Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-exclude-companies-from-a-search.md): Step-by-step guide to creating a blacklist of companies and excluding them from your company search results using TheirStack's company list filters.
- [How to Find Companies by Technology Stack](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-find-companies-by-technology-stack.md): Step-by-step guide to finding companies that use specific technologies. Build targeted lead lists by filtering companies based on their tech stack, combined with firmographic data like size, industry, and funding.
- [Find hidden candidates with niche technology experience](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-find-hidden-candidates-niche-technology.md): Use TheirStack technographic data to identify companies using a specific platform in your target market, then cross-reference with LinkedIn Recruiter to surface candidates whose hands-on expertise doesn't appear on their profile.
- [How to find old job postings](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-find-old-jobs.md): Learn how to find old, expired, and deleted job postings from any company — including LinkedIn and Indeed. Access historical job data dating back to 2021 using TheirStack search, company lookup, API, or datasets.
- [How to Find Promoted Jobs](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-find-promoted-jobs.md): Learn how to find promoted (sponsored) job listings on other job boards and turn them into sales leads for job board operators, recruiters, and HR software vendors.
- [How to Find Reposted Jobs](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-find-reposted-jobs.md): Learn how to find reposted job listings and use them as strong hiring signals for sales prospecting, recruiting, and competitive intelligence.
- [Identifying companies with problems your software solves](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-identify-companies-with-problems-your-software-solves.md): Learn how to use job postings to discover companies actively hiring for tasks your software automates. Find your ideal customers by analyzing 199M job descriptions for specific pain points and manual processes.
- [Monitor buying intent on a target account list](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-monitor-buying-intent-on-target-accounts.md): Get real-time alerts when companies on your target account list show buying intent for a specific topic — combine TheirStack's buying intent dataset with a target account list and a webhook to power ABM workflows.
- [How to Monitor Competitor Hiring](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-monitor-competitor-hiring.md): Learn how to track competitor job postings to uncover their strategy, identify expansion plans, and spot market opportunities before anyone else.
- [How to monitor job postings automatically](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-monitor-job-postings-automatically.md): Learn how to automatically monitor job postings and get real-time alerts when companies post new jobs. Set up automated job tracking with webhooks to Slack, CRM, or any system.
- [Monitor tech stack changes on a target account list](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-monitor-tech-stack-on-target-accounts.md): Get real-time alerts when companies on your target account list start hiring for a specific technology — combine TheirStack's technographic data with a target account list and a webhook to catch tech stack adoption signals on the accounts that matter to you.
- [Outreach companies actively hiring](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-outreach-on-autopilot-to-companies-actively-hiring.md): Learn how to set up automated outreach to companies actively hiring using TheirStack webhooks and integrations — send personalized messages as soon as new job postings match your criteria.
- [How to Scrape Job Data for a List of Company Domains](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-scrape-job-data-for-a-list-of-company-domains.md): Learn how to get job posting data for hundreds of company domains at once — without building scrapers. Query TheirStack's pre-indexed database of 199M+ jobs from 333k+ sources by domain via the app or API.
- [How to Search Job Postings Across 328,000+ Sources](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-search-job-postings-across-sources.md): Complete guide to searching millions of job postings from 328,000+ sources. Learn how to combine filters for sales prospecting, recruiting, and market research — with full walkthroughs for each use case.
- [How to send a slack message for every new job found](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-send-jobs-to-slack.md): Step-by-step guide to automatically notify your team in Slack whenever new jobs are posted using TheirStack's webhook integration with Make, Zapier, or N8n.
- [Spotting your competitors' next moves](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-spot-your-competitors-next-moves.md): Learn how to use job postings as an early signal for competitor expansion. Track new locations, new teams, and strategic initiatives 6-18 months before they show up on maps and press releases.
- [How to Target Companies by the Technology They Use](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-target-companies-by-technology.md): Learn three proven strategies for targeting companies based on their tech stack — must-have technologies, competitor customers, and partner integrations — to build high-fit prospect lists.
- [Use job data for investment research](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/how-to-use-job-data-for-investment-research.md): Add job posting data to your equity research stack as a complementary signal. Anticipate layoffs and hiring freezes, infer product-stage from hiring mix, and read cost-per-hire pressure from repost cadence weeks before any of it shows up in earnings.
- [How to Build LinkedIn Audiences from Hiring Intent](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/linkedin-audiences-hiring-intent.md): Learn how to target companies hiring for specific roles by exporting a LinkedIn company audience from TheirStack hiring intent data.
- [How to Build LinkedIn Audiences from Technographics Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/linkedin-audiences-technographics-data.md): Learn how to target companies using specific technologies in LinkedIn Campaign Manager by building a company list from technographic data and exporting it in LinkedIn Audiences CSV format.
- [Monitoring open jobs from current and past customers](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/monitoring-open-jobs-from-current-and-past-customers.md): How to know which companies from a given list are actively hiring. This can help SaaS companies detect new needs of their current customers for potential upsells, and also recruitment companies to find old customers that are hiring again and could be easier to sell to than if they were completely new customers.
- [Integration guide for sales intelligence software](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/guides/sales-software-integration-guide.md): This guide provides detailed instructions on integrating TheirStack into your product, including all possible connectors, marketing content and best practices.

### webhooks

- [How to set up a webhook](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/how-to-set-up-a-webhook.md): Learn how to set up a webhook to get notified when events occur (new jobs, tech changes, etc) in TheirStack and trigger actions in your external systems like N8N, Zapier, Make, Airtable, etc
- [Webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks.md): Learn how to use webhooks to get notified when events occur (new jobs, tech changes, etc) in TheirStack and trigger actions in your external systems like N8N, Zapier, Make, Airtable, etc
- [Monitor your webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/monitor-your-webhooks.md): Track your webhook performance with detailed analytics. Learn how to view webhook usage statistics, understand event statuses, and troubleshoot webhook delivery issues using TheirStack's built-in monitoring dashboard.
- [Receive TheirStack events in your webhook endpoint](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/receive-theirstack-events-in-your-webhook-endpoint.md): Learn the essential technical requirements for building webhook endpoints that receive TheirStack job and company data. Covers status codes, retry logic, concurrency handling, and duplicate prevention.
- [Verify webhook signatures](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/verify-webhook-signatures.md): Learn how to verify that webhook deliveries come from TheirStack by validating the HMAC-SHA256 signature included in each request.
- [Company.New](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/event-type/webhook_company_new.md): Triggered when a new company matching your saved search criteria is discovered. [Learn more about webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks).
- [Job.New](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks/event-type/webhook_job_new.md): Triggered when a new job matching your saved search criteria is discovered. [Learn more about webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/webhooks).

### api-reference

- [Authentication](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/authentication.md): Learn how to set up TheirStack API authentication with Bearer token API keys — create, manage, and revoke keys directly from your account settings.
- [Introduction](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference.md): Explore the TheirStack API — the largest database of jobs and technographics. Search job postings, company tech stacks, and more across 100+ countries.
- [Pagination](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/pagination.md): Learn how to paginate TheirStack API responses with page-based and offset-based methods, including tips for faster queries on GET and POST endpoints.
- [Quickstart](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/quickstart.md): Get started with the Job Search, Company Search and Technographics APIs in minutes — build a query with 30+ filters in the app, then export the cURL to Postman, Make, or n8n.
- [Rate Limit](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/rate-limit.md): Discover how TheirStack API rate limits work across free and paid tiers, with sliding windows, IETF-compliant headers, and retry best practices.
- [Get Credit Balance](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/billing/get_billing_credit_balance_v0.md): Retrieve your team's current credit balance including remaining credits available for API calls, searches, and data exports across all endpoints.
- [Get Companies Per Company Country Code](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/get_catalog_companies_per_company_country_code_v0.md): Retrieve all ISO country codes with the number of companies headquartered in each country. Use this endpoint for geographic distribution analysis. Calls to this endpoint are free and do not consume any API credits.
- [Get Industries](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/get_catalog_industries_v0.md): This endpoint lets you list all the industries and their codes, see how many jobs and companies we have per industry and search for an industry.
- [Get Jobs And Companies Per Job Country Code](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/get_catalog_jobs_companies_per_job_country_code_v0.md): This endpoint will return all the country codes and the number of jobs whose location's country code is the given one, and the number of companies with jobs in that country.
- [Get Technologies And Buying Intents](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/get_catalog_keywords_v0.md): List all keywords tracked by TheirStack, including both technologies and buying intent topics. Search for any keyword and filter by one or more categories.
- [Get Geographic Locations](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/get_catalog_locations_v0.md): Search for geographic locations by name or ID to retrieve standardized location data including city, region, and country. Use location IDs with job_location_or and job_location_not filters for precise geographic targeting in job searches.
- [Get Keyword Categories](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/list_keyword_categories_v1.md): Returns a list of main keyword categories (technologies and buying intents) with the number of keywords and companies in each. Optionally filters to return a specific category if category_slug is provided.
- [Get Keyword Subcategories](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/catalog/list_keyword_subcategories_v1.md): Returns a list of keyword subcategories with their keywords. Behavior: returns all subcategories if no parameters are provided; returns all subcategories for a specific parent category if only category_slug is provided; returns a specific subcategory if both category_slug and subcategory_slug are provided.
- [Buying Intents](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/companies/buying_intents_v1.md): This endpoint lists the buying intent topics detected for a company. For each topic, it returns the confidence level (`low`, `medium`, `high`), the number of jobs that mention the topic, and the first and last dates it was mentioned.
- [Company Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/companies/search_companies_v1.md): This endpoint lets you search for companies by technology stack, hiring signals, and firmographics. It returns a list of companies that match the search criteria, along with the jobs and technology objects for each company that match the filters you've passed.
- [Technographics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/companies/technographics_v1.md): This endpoint lists the technologies used by a company. For each technology, it returns the confidence level (`low`, `medium`, `high`), the number of jobs that mention the technology, and the first and last dates it was mentioned.
- [Get Credits Consumption](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/credit-consumption/get_teams_credits_consumption_v0.md): Retrieve daily credit consumption data for your team showing the number of API records returned per day. Use this endpoint to monitor usage trends, track spending, and optimize your API integration.
- [Delete Company List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/delete_company_lists_by_id_v0.md): 
- [Get List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/get_company_lists_by_id_v0.md): 
- [Export Companies From List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/get_company_lists_companies_export_v0.md): Export companies from a saved list to a downloadable CSV or XLSX file. The export includes company details such as domain, industry, size, location, funding, and revenue data for offline analysis.
- [Get Companies From List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/get_company_lists_companies_v0.md): 
- [List All Lists](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/get_company_lists_v0.md): Retrieve all company lists for the current team including list name, company count, and creation date. Use company lists to organize and segment companies for targeted outreach and analysis.
- [Rename Company List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/patch_company_lists_by_id_v0.md): 
- [Add Companies To Multiple Lists](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/post_company_lists_add_companies_multiple_v0.md): 
- [Add Companies To List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/post_company_lists_add_companies_v0.md): 
- [Duplicate List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/post_company_lists_duplicate_v0.md): 
- [Remove Companies From List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/post_company_lists_remove_companies_v0.md): 
- [Create Company List](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/company-lists/post_company_lists_v0.md): 
- [List Datasets](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/datasets/get_datasets_v1.md): Retrieve all datasets available for your team including jobs, companies, and technographics. Datasets are updated daily in Parquet format. Use this endpoint to get the latest download URLs for bulk data access.
- [Generate Dataset Credentials](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/datasets/post_datasets_credentials_v1.md): Generate temporary S3 credentials to directly access and download dataset files from cloud storage. Credentials are valid for 7 days by default and provide read-only access to your team's available datasets.
- [Get Email Preferences](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/email-preferences/get_email_preferences_v0.md): 
- [Update Email Preferences](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/email-preferences/put_email_preferences_v0.md): 
- [One-Click Unsubscribe (Rfc 8058)](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/email-preferences/unsubscribe_email_one_click_v0.md): 
- [Unsubscribe From Email](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/email-preferences/unsubscribe_email_v0.md): 
- [Free count](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/features/free-count.md): Discover how to use TheirStack's free count feature to estimate matching records in Job and Company Search endpoints without spending API credits.
- [Preview data mode](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/features/preview-data-mode.md): Discover how to use preview data mode in TheirStack API to show blurred job and company results without consuming credits. Save API calls today.
- [Avoiding getting the same job twice](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/guides/avoid-getting-same-jobs-twice.md): Discover how to use discovered_at_gte and job_id_not filters to avoid getting duplicate jobs in the Job Search API and save credits on every call.
- [Job Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/jobs/search_jobs_v1.md): This endpoint lets you search for jobs posted on thousands of websites and filter by multiple filters, such as job titles, companies, locations, company attributes, dates and many more.
- [Get Request Count](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/requests/get_requests_count_v0.md): Retrieve the daily count of API requests made by your team within a specified date range. Use this endpoint to monitor API usage patterns, identify peak activity periods, and plan capacity.
- [Get Saved Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/saved-searches/get_saved_searches_by_id_v0.md): 
- [List All Saved Searches](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/saved-searches/get_saved_searches_v0.md): Retrieve all active saved searches for the current user including search filters, type, and creation date. Archived saved searches are excluded. Filter by user IDs or search type and sort by name, created, or updated date.
- [Archive Saved Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/saved-searches/patch_saved_searches_archive_v0.md): Archive a saved search by its ID to remove it from the active list. Archived searches are hidden from the default listing but can still be referenced. Associated webhooks will stop triggering for archived searches.
- [Update Saved Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/saved-searches/patch_saved_searches_by_id_v0.md): 
- [Create Saved Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/saved-searches/post_saved_searches_v0.md): 
- [Get Webhook By Id](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/get_webhooks_by_id_v0.md): Retrieve the full details of a specific webhook by its ID including configuration, status, target URL, event type, linked saved search, and creation timestamp. Use this to inspect or debug a webhook setup.
- [Get Aggregated Webhook Event Count](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/get_webhooks_events_count_aggregated_v0.md): Retrieve webhook event counts aggregated by day within a date range, with options to group by delivery status or webhook ID. Use this endpoint to build time-series charts for monitoring webhook performance and reliability.
- [Get Webhook Event Count](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/get_webhooks_events_count_v0.md): Get the total count of events triggered for a specific webhook. Use this endpoint to quickly check webhook activity volume without fetching the full event list, useful for monitoring dashboards and usage tracking.
- [List Webhook Events](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/get_webhooks_events_v0.md): Retrieve a paginated list of all events triggered for a specific webhook including delivery status, payload, and timestamps. Filter by event status to find failed deliveries that may need to be retried.
- [List All Webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/get_webhooks_v0.md): Retrieve all active webhooks configured for your team including their status, target URL, event type, and linked saved search. Archived webhooks are excluded from the response. Use this to monitor your webhook integrations.
- [Archive Webhook](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/patch_webhooks_archive_v0.md): Archive a webhook by its ID to permanently stop event delivery and remove it from the active webhook list. Archived webhooks and their event history are retained for reference but will no longer trigger notifications.
- [Update Webhook](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/patch_webhooks_by_id_v0.md): 
- [Enable/Disable A Webhook](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/patch_webhooks_status_v0.md): By disabling a webhook, it will stop listening to events. When you enable a webhook, it will process all the events that have not been processed yet since you disabled it.
- [Retry Webhook Events](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/post_webhooks_events_retry_v0.md): Retry delivery of failed webhook events by providing their event IDs. Use this endpoint to recover from transient failures such as network timeouts or temporary server errors on your receiving endpoint.
- [Test Webhook Url](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/post_webhooks_test_v0.md): Send a test event to verify connectivity and payload handling. Either provide a webhook_id to test an existing webhook (with optional url/secret overrides), or provide url and event_type directly to test before creating a webhook.
- [Create New Webhook](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/api-reference/webhooks/post_webhooks_v0.md): Create a new webhook that listens for events from a saved search and sends real-time HTTP POST notifications to your specified URL. Configure event types, filters, and delivery settings for automated data pipelines.

### affiliate-program

- [Affiliate Program](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/affiliate-program.md): Earn 30% commission for every new customer you refer successfully. Discover the commission structure, how payouts work, and how to get started.

### app

- [Company Enrichment](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/company-enrichment.md): Enrich your company lists with technographic and buying intent data — via CSV upload, manual input, or programmatically through our API.
- [Company Lookup](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/company-lookup.md): Look up any company by name or domain to see their full technology stack, buying intent topics, job postings, and firmographic data.
- [Company Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/company-search.md): Search and filter companies by technology stack, buying intent, industry, size, funding, and more. Build targeted lead lists with technographic and firmographic data.
- [App](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app.md): Effortlessly explore, search, and analyze job posting and technographic data with TheirStack's intuitive, user-friendly interface — no coding required.
- [Companies Seen](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/company-lists/companies-seen.md): Discover how the Companies Seen list tracks all revealed companies permanently, how it differs from the 90-day reveal filter, and why counts vary.
- [Company Lists](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/company-lists.md): Explore Company Lists to organize, track company reveals, filter your searches, and exclude duplicates for efficient lead research workflows.
- [Find people](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/contact-data/find-people.md): Find email and phone numbers for decision-makers at companies using TheirStack integrations with Apollo, ContactOut, Instantly, LinkedIn Recruiter, and Sales Navigator
- [Hiring Manager](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/contact-data/hiring-manager.md): Discover hiring manager data with names, roles, and LinkedIn profile URLs for job postings. Access and filter via TheirStack's UI and API platform.
- [Contact Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/contact-data.md): Discover how TheirStack connects you with contact data through Apollo.io, ContactOut, and LinkedIn integrations, plus hiring manager information
- [Excluding recruiting agencies](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/job-search/excluding-recruiting-agencies.md): Learn how to exclude recruiting agencies from your job search results using company type, industry, and description-based filters in TheirStack.
- [Job Search](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/job-search.md): Search and filter job postings by title, technology, salary, location, and 20+ other attributes. Combine with company filters to find jobs at companies matching your ICP.
- [Filtering out non-tech jobs](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/job-search/tech-jobs-only.md): Find only tech jobs in TheirStack using job title keywords and technology filters — includes ready-to-use keyword lists for 60+ technical roles.
- [Email Alerts](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/saved-searches/email-alerts.md): Learn how to set up daily and weekly notifications to get fresh job or company opportunities delivered straight to your inbox, so you never miss out on potential prospects again.
- [Saved Searches](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/saved-searches.md): Learn how to save, organize, and manage your job and company searches so you can quickly re-run them, set up email alerts, and connect webhooks.
- [Notification Preferences](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/app/settings/notifications.md): Learn how to control which emails TheirStack sends you. Toggle off any notification category from Settings to stop those emails instantly.

### careers

- [Careers at TheirStack](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/careers.md): TheirStack is a small team of engineers building the future of job and technographic data. Explore open positions and join us in making company intelligence accessible to everyone.

### integrations

- [Clay](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/integrations/clay.md): Learn how to add a new column in a Clay table with TheirStack data or create an entirely new table in Clay with live job posting and technographic data from TheirStack.
- [LinkedIn Audiences](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/integrations/linkedin-audiences.md): Export companies from TheirStack in LinkedIn company list format so you can build audiences from technographic data and hiring intent.
- [Make](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/integrations/make.md): Learn how to connect TheirStack with Make.com — pull job postings and company data on-demand via HTTP modules, or automate real-time notifications through webhooks.
- [N8N](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/integrations/n8n.md): Learn how to connect TheirStack with N8N — pull job postings and company data via HTTP Request nodes, or automate real-time notifications through webhooks.
- [Zapier](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/integrations/zapier.md): Learn how to connect TheirStack with Zapier — automate real-time job and company notifications through webhooks, and trigger any of Zapier's 7,000+ app integrations.

### legal

- [Cookies Policy](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/cookies-policy.md): Read the TheirStack cookies policy to understand what types of cookies we use, how to disable them, and how we handle third-party cookies to enhance your browsing experience.
- [Data Collection & Legal Compliance](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/data-collection.md): How TheirStack collects job and company data from publicly available sources, the legal frameworks we operate under (CFAA, GDPR, hiQ Labs ruling), and how individuals can exercise their rights.
- [Data Processing Addendum](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/dpa.md): 
- [GDPR](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/gdpr.md): Ensuring GDPR compliance, TheirStack.com prioritizes lawful data processing, transparency, data minimization, robust security, and respect for individual rights. Our practices include regular audits to maintain the highest standards of data protection and privacy.
- [Privacy Policy](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/privacy-policy.md): Read the TheirStack privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform, website, and related services.
- [Refunds and Cancellations](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/refunds-and-cancellations.md): Read the TheirStack refunds and cancellations policy to understand the conditions under which refunds are issued and how to cancel your subscription or one-off plan.
- [Data Sub-processors](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/subprocessors.md): 
- [Terms and Conditions](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/legal/terms-and-conditions.md): Read the TheirStack terms and conditions to understand the rules, guidelines, and legal agreements governing your use of our platform, API, and data services.

### pricing

- [Auto recharge credits](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/pricing/auto-recharge-credits.md): Learn how to set up auto recharge rules to prevent running out of credits in production — configure thresholds, recharge amounts, and payment methods to ensure uninterrupted API access.
- [Credits](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/pricing/credits.md): Learn the difference between API credits and Company credits, how each type is consumed, and how to monitor your credit usage across searches, reveals, and API calls.
- [Pricing](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/pricing.md): Learn more about TheirStack pricing — explore available plans, understand the credit system for API and company data, and set up auto-recharge rules to keep your workflows running.
- [Plans](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/pricing/plans.md): Learn about the different plans available on TheirStack — compare features, credit allowances, and API access across Free, Starter, Growth, and Enterprise tiers to find the right fit.
- [Usage](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/pricing/usage.md): Learn how to view your credit usage, webhook events, and API requests with detailed charts showing breakdowns by status, type, and time period.

### data

- [How we source buying intent data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/buying-intent/how-we-source-buying-intent-data.md): Learn how TheirStack detects buying intent signals from millions of job postings worldwide, classifying them into 14 keyword types to reveal what companies are actively investing in.
- [Buying Intent Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/buying-intent.md): Detect buying intent signals from job postings across 9,000+ topics and 14 keyword types. Identify companies actively looking to buy software, services, and equipment based on what they hire for.
- [Statistics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/buying-intent/statistics.md): Discover buying intent data statistics with thousands of topics tracked, millions of signals, and companies monitored across global job postings.
- [Use cases](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/buying-intent/use-cases.md): Discover how teams use buying intent data from job postings to identify companies actively investing in specific areas, sell to high-intent prospects, and build targeted account lists.
- [Company Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/company.md): Access detailed company profiles for 12M companies across 238 countries. Filter by industry, employee count, revenue, funding, tech stack, hiring activity, and more.
- [Statistics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/company/statistics.md): Learn how many companies are discovered each month and how they are distributed by industry, employee size, headquarters country, and data source.
- [Data workflow](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job/data-workflow.md): Learn how we transform raw job postings into high-quality, normalized data through our 6-step workflow covering crawling, cleaning, extraction, deduplication, enrichment, and quality control
- [Freshness](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job/freshness.md): We discover 86% of jobs same-day and 98% within 48 hours. Learn how our multi-tiered scraping works and why some jobs appear with a delay.
- [Job Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job.md): Access millions of real-time job listings from 333k+ sources across 195 countries. Get comprehensive job market data with advanced filters, company insights, and lightning-fast API responses.
- [Sources](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job/sources.md): Our platform aggregates job listings from over 333k different websites. Below you'll find a breakdown of our largest job data sources and their contributions.
- [Statistics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job/statistics.md): Explore job posting statistics with monthly trends since 2021, plus detailed breakdowns by country, platform, and workplace type in the job market.
- [Use cases](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/job/use-cases.md): Discover how businesses use job data for lead generation, market intelligence, competitor tracking, and platform growth across recruiting, consulting, and SaaS industries
- [How we source tech stack data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/technographic/how-we-source-tech-stack-data.md): Discover how TheirStack extracts tech stack data from millions of job postings worldwide using confidence scoring to identify company technologies.
- [Technographic Data](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/technographic.md): Discover TheirStack's comprehensive technographic database with 32k technologies mapped across 12M companies worldwide. Access real-time tech stack insights derived from millions of job postings with confidence scoring and complete data transparency.
- [Statistics](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/technographic/statistics.md): Discover technographics data statistics with millions of signals, 5000+ technologies tracked, and 20M+ companies monitored across global job postings.
- [Use cases](https://theirstack.com/en/docs/data/technographic/use-cases.md): Discover how teams use technographic data to find companies by tech stack, enrich accounts, and identify competitor customers for targeted B2B sales.

## Blog

- [13 ATS Platforms with Public Job Posting APIs](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/13-ats-platforms-with-public-job-posting-api.md): Building a job board and need to automate job imports? Find out which ATS offer public APIs without authentication so you can integrate job postings from specific clients.
- [6 ways to find old job postings](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/6-ways-to-find-old-job-posting.md): Discover practical methods to uncover historical job postings from any company. Learn how to access expired listings using archives, search tricks, and specialized data providers.
- [How 6nomads Finds Fast-Growing Companies](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/6nomads-leverages-theirstack-to-find-fast-growing-companies-with-big-hiring-needs.md): Discover how 6nomads leverages TheirStack to identify fast-growing companies with big hiring needs and build a pipeline of qualified leads for their recruiting business.
- [How to Backfill a Job Board: Strategy & Tips](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/backfill-job-board.md): Learn what job board backfilling is, why it matters for growth, and how to build a backfill strategy that boosts inventory, SEO, and user engagement without sacrificing quality.
- [API update: blur_company_data for single company queries](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/blur-company-data-changes.md): Starting October 13, 2025, blur_company_data won't have any effect when filtering by a single company and will be charged as if it wasn't there. If jobs are returned, you'll be charged 1 API credit per job. If no jobs are returned, you'll be charged 0 API credits.
- [Build vs Buy: Job Data Aggregation for Your Product](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/build-vs-buy-job-data-aggregation.md): A decision framework for teams evaluating whether to build job data infrastructure from ATS APIs or buy from an aggregator. Includes TCO comparison, scoring rubric, and real engineering estimates.
- [What is Buyer Intent Data? Types, Signals, and How to Use It](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/buyer-intent-data.md): Discover what buyer intent data is, explore key signal types like active and passive intent, and learn how to use intent data to close more B2B deals.
- [Buying Intent: The Backbone of Sales & Marketing](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/buying-intent.md): Learn what buying intent is, how to measure it across outbound and inbound prospects, and how to use intent-based lead scoring to close more deals.
- [How to Build a Profitable Niche Job Board](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/how-to-build-a-profitable-niche-job-board.md): A comprehensive guide to building a profitable niche job board — covering niche selection, monetization strategies, job aggregation, SEO, and scaling your job board business.

From job postings to sales intelligence tools, here's what actually works.

This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial on how to extract job data from Indeed efficiently and effectively.

- [Jobs are now up to 3x cheaper in our API and webhooks](https://theirstack.com/en/blog/jobs-are-now-up-to-3x-cheaper.md): We are lowering the cost per job in our API and webhooks and changing the default behavior of the job search endpoint to help you save on data costs.
