## Product Updates

- [New easy_apply field and filter for job postings](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-01-10-easy-apply-filter.md): Filter job postings by easy_apply status to identify roles accepting direct applications through job boards versus those requiring redirection to the company website
- [Job seniority filter, URL detection, duplicate fix](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-01-14-job-seniority-shortened-urls.md): New job_seniority_or filter to search jobs by seniority level, automatic shortened URL resolution for newly discovered jobs, and improved duplicate job posting detection
- [Clay export](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-01-20-clay-export.md): Export your job and company search results directly to Clay.com tables using our webhooks integration, enabling seamless data transfer in just a few clicks
- [Webhooks launch](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-01-27-webhooks-launch.md): Subscribe to webhooks and get notified when new jobs are posted, with integrations for Make.com, Zapier, Clay, and any tool that supports webhooks
- [Webhook observability](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-06-webhook-observability.md): Monitor your webhook performance with new charts displaying the number of webhooks sent and detailed event tables for tracking each webhook execution
- [API key refresh + Member removal + API observability](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-12-api-key-refresh-member-removal.md): Refresh your API key for security rotation, remove members from your organization, and monitor API request status codes through the new observability dashboard
- [Invoices page + Billing alerts](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-17-invoices-billing-alerts.md): View and download invoices in PDF format, monitor webhook executions on the usage page, and receive email notifications when billing consumption exceeds 70% or 100%
- [Track company credits consumption](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-18-company-credits-tracking.md): Monitor and track your company credits consumption directly from the usage page, giving you full visibility into how your organization uses its allocated credits
- [Datasets page](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-18-datasets-page.md): Browse all available datasets on the new datasets page, preview dataset contents, and download sample files to evaluate data quality before purchasing
- [Job searches are now ~4x faster ⚡️](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-24-job-search-performance.md): Job search response times improved by up to 91%, with average latency dropping from 6.9s to 1.7s and 99th percentile response times reduced from 120s to 11s
- [UI redesign](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-25-ui-redesign.md): Redesigned user interface focused on developer experience, making it easier than ever to manage webhooks, datasets, API keys, and review your consumption
- [Enhanced ATS URL filter](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-02-26-enhanced-ats-url-filter.md): The enhanced ATS URL exists filter now excludes jobs with URLs from over 70 major job boards like ZipRecruiter and TheHub, helping you find direct employer postings
- [Dataset page improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-03-dataset-improvements-march.md): Download dataset dictionaries with full field documentation, view dataset file sizes and row counts, and better understand dataset contents before downloading
- [New v2.0.0 for the Technographics dataset](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-10-new-technographics-dataset-v2.md): 
- [Webhook observability + retry mechanism](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-10-webhook-observability-retry-technographics.md): View webhook response bodies and status codes, filter events by success or failure, and benefit from automatic retry of failed webhooks every hour for up to 48 hours
- [Documentation improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-11-documentation-improvements-march.md): Updated documentation including new webhooks guides, improved Clay integration docs, and an enhanced step-by-step guide for backfilling job board data with TheirStack
- [New technographics dataset endpoint + Usage improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-12-dataset-endpoint-usage-improvements.md): Access the new technographics dataset endpoint in parquet format, view both UI and API requests in the usage page, and open searches directly from API request details
- [Roles and permissions + Export limit increase](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-14-roles-permissions-export-limit.md): Admins can now manage team members and receive billing alerts with the new roles and permissions system, plus CSV exports now support more than 100,000 records
- [Webhooks API is publicly available](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-03-17-webhooks-api-public-release.md): The webhooks API is now publicly available, enabling programmatic webhook management to automate webhook creation and integrate real-time job notifications into your systems
- [New Auto recharge rules](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-01-auto-recharge.md): Set up automatic credit recharge rules to purchase credits when your balance runs low, ensuring uninterrupted access to TheirStack data and API services
- [Company search fixes](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-02-company-search-fixes.md): Fixed technology category column display issues in company search, including missing per-technology columns when filtering by category and incorrect columns persisting after filter changes
- [Subscription update process enhancements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-04-subscription-enhancements.md): Fixed subscription updates creating new subscriptions instead of modifying existing ones, and added the ability to customize credit allocation when changing your plan
- [Search experience has been improved](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-15-search-experience-improvements.md): Cleaned up the job and company search page header with breadcrumb-only search names, and added a new webhooks button to view and manage webhooks associated with each search
- [New webhook setting `trigger once per company`](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-15-trigger-once-per-company.md): New webhook setting that fires only once per company, preventing duplicate triggers for sales workflows where you want to act on the first job posted per company
- [Webhook usage analytics](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-04-15-webhook-usage-analytics.md): Track individual webhook performance and credit consumption with a detailed breakdown chart on the usage page, showing which webhooks are using the most credits
- [New docs](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-06-documentation-revamp.md): Revamped TheirStack documentation with a new sidebar navigation, merged similar pages to reduce duplication, and added a dedicated dataset page to help users discover features
- [Slow company searches are now 2-6x faster](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-07-slow-company-searches-are-now-2-6x-faster.md): 
- [Stable company logo URLs](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-07-stable-logos-performance.md): 
- [Export data with revealed records](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-16-export-only-revealed.md): Export all records from already revealed companies without consuming additional credits, making it easy to re-download data you have previously accessed in TheirStack
- [Error handling improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-20-error-handling.md): Improved error handling across the TheirStack app with clearer notification titles and descriptions so users can quickly understand what went wrong and how to resolve issues
- [Slack integration guide](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-21-slack-integration-guide.md): New step-by-step guide showing how to set up a TheirStack webhook integration to automatically send newly discovered job postings directly to your Slack channels
- [API error handling standardization](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-22-api-error-standardization.md): Standardized API error responses across all endpoints with a consistent error object that includes request_id, code, title, and message fields for easier debugging and integration
- [URL domain filters for Job and Company Search](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-27-examples-filters-api-docs.md): Added url_domain_or and url_domain_not filters to the Job Search and Company Search API endpoints, letting you target or exclude jobs from specific platforms like Greenhouse, Workable, and LinkedIn
- [URL domain filters](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-27-url-domain-filters.md): New domain-based filters for Jobs and Company search endpoints allowing you to target or exclude jobs from specific platforms like greenhouse.io, workable.com, and linkedin.com
- [Improved extraction of matching phrases](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-29-matching-phrases.md): Fixed an issue where matching_phrases and matching_words fields could be empty when filtering jobs by keywords, ensuring matched terms are now correctly extracted from job descriptions
- [New AI and infrastructure technologies](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-05-29-new-technologies.md): Large expansion of technology detection covering AI coding tools like Cursor and Devin, infrastructure platforms like Opentofu and Buck2, and dozens more across QMS, procurement, and fintech categories
- [Search performance improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-03-search-performance-improvements.md): Job and company search performance improved by up to 30x for pattern-based filters like company_name_partial_match and job_title_pattern, especially with large filter arrays of 50 or more elements
- [Jobs are now 3x cheaper](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-04-jobs-pricing-reduction.md): Job data pricing has been reduced by 3x, making it significantly more affordable to access job postings and hiring signals through the TheirStack API and platform
- [New job description contains-any filter](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-06-job-description-contains-any.md): New contains-any filter for job descriptions that matches whole words without requiring regex patterns, available in both the Job Search page and the Jobs Search API endpoint
- [No results message in job and company searches](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-06-no-results-message-improvement.md): Improved the no-results experience in job and company searches with clearer, more helpful messages that guide users on how to adjust their filters, especially on small screens
- [Profile page](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-06-profile-page-updates.md): New profile page in TheirStack settings where you can update your first name, last name, and other personal details associated with your account
- [Better loading experience in app searches](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-09-better-loading-experience.md): Enhanced loading experience for job and company searches with a progress banner displaying real-time status and logos from the main data sources being queried
- [Database timeout status code changed to 504](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-09-database-timeout-status-change.md): Changed the HTTP status code for database query timeouts from 408 Request Timeout to 504 Gateway Timeout, which better reflects server-side timeout behavior for API integrations
- [Job titles special characters fix](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-10-job-titles-special-characters-fix.md): Fixed a display issue where special characters like ampersands in job titles were not rendering correctly, ensuring proper character encoding across the platform
- [Unified search requires explicit action](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-10-unified-search-experience.md): Job and company searches no longer auto-run when filters change. You must now click the Search button to execute queries, giving you more control over complex searches on historical data.
- [Improvements on usage page](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-12-usage-page-improvements.md): The usage page now shows request duration, includes a dedicated requests page with an expanded table, improved empty states for charts, and a smoother loading experience.
- [Save button fix](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-13-save-button-fix.md): Fixed a bug where the save button was not working when using the url_domain_or filter, so you can now save searches that include domain filtering without issues.
- [Auto-reveal fix + Webhook URL fix](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-16-auto-reveal-webhook-fix.md): Fixed an issue where companies were being auto-revealed during searches when they should not have been, and fixed the webhook test event button which was using an outdated URL.
- [Naukri job source + Company modal improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-23-naukri-india-company-modal.md): Added Naukri as a new job source to dramatically expand coverage of the Indian job market, and improved the company modal to show helpful messaging when no data is available.
- [Seek job source](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-25-seek-australia.md): Added Seek as a new job source for Australia, one of the country's largest job boards, significantly expanding coverage of the Australian job market with thousands of new postings.
- [Usage page improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-26-usage-page-improvements.md): Fixed the webhook events chart not updating when changing the date range, added more colors for clients with multiple webhooks, and sorted the webhook list by event count.
- [Mobile fix - Company lookup button](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-27-mobile-fix.md): Fixed the "Look up a company" button not opening on mobile devices, ensuring it now works correctly across all mobile browsers and screen sizes for a consistent experience.
- [Naukri Gulf job source](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-06-30-naukri-gulf.md): Added Naukri Gulf as a new job source expanding coverage across Gulf Cooperation Council countries including UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, and Bahrain.
- [New job sources (France, Asia-Pacific)](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-14-job-sources-france-apac.md): Expanded job coverage with Welcome to the Jungle for the French market and JobsDB and JobStreet for Asia-Pacific markets including Hong Kong, Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, Indonesia, and Thailand.
- [Property exists OR filter + Company type improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-17-property-exists-or-filter.md): Added the property_exists_or filter to Jobs and Company Search endpoints to find records where at least one specified property exists, and improved company_type filtering to exclude recruiting agencies.
- [New property exists filters (AND / OR)](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-18-property-exists-filters.md): Introduced property_exists_and and property_exists_or filters in Jobs and Companies search endpoints to require that specific fields like final_url, hiring_team, or domain are present.
- [New technology_slugs property on Job Search](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-18-technology-slugs-on-jobs.md): Each job returned by the Jobs Search endpoint now includes a technology_slugs array containing the technology identifiers detected in the job title, description, or URL.
- [Company webhooks improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-23-company-webhooks.md): Company webhooks now support continuous monitoring and automatically send events whenever new companies matching your search criteria are discovered, enabling real-time alerts for technology adoption.
- [API dialog improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-29-api-dialog.md): Improved the API dialog to properly handle special characters like apostrophes in request bodies and added curl command support for exports, technographics, and other request types.
- [New default limit for technographics API](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-07-30-new-default-limit-technographics-api.md): The Technographics API endpoint now returns all technologies by default instead of only 25 per request, eliminating the need for pagination to retrieve complete company tech stack data.
- [New affiliate program](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-07-new-affiliate-program.md): Launched an improved affiliate program with higher commission rates and a self-service portal for partners, making it easier to earn revenue by referring customers to TheirStack.
- [New normalized 'locations' property in job results](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-08-locations-property.md): The Jobs Search endpoint now returns a normalized locations array for each job with structured geographic data including coordinates, administrative divisions, and country codes based on the GeoNames database.
- [New employment statuses filters](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-11-employment-statuses.md): Added the employment_statuses_or filter to Jobs and Companies search endpoints to match statuses like full_time or seasonal, plus new property_exists options to filter for jobs where employment status data is available.
- [Company domain enrichment improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-12-company-domain-enrichment-improvements.md): Enhanced company domain identification by filtering out social media and link shortener URLs, and improved name-matching accuracy to prevent small companies from being falsely associated with larger ones.
- [Job processing improvements](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-13-job-processing-improvements.md): Improved job data quality by fixing double-escaped Markdown in YCombinator descriptions, correcting Join.com job locations to reflect actual positions, and populating missing salary_string fields.
- [Location filter has better matching for states and regions](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-08-19-improve-location-filter-in-jobs.md): Location filters in Jobs and Company search now use the normalized locations array for improved geographic matching across states, regions, and cities
- [New filter `company_linkedin_url` in Technographics endpoint](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-02-company-linkedin-url-technographics-endpoint.md): Filter companies by LinkedIn URL directly in the Technographics endpoint without needing to search for domain or name first, reducing API calls and credits needed
- [Fixed missing employment status data across job sources](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-02-employement-statuses-fix.md): Resolved an issue where employment status information (full-time, part-time, etc.) was missing from job listings that should have included this data
- [New Location Filters for geographic targeting](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-04-add-new-filter-for-locations.md): Introducing job_location_or and job_location_not filters for precise location-based job search using structured location IDs with hierarchical and multi-language support
- [Locations Catalog for geographic targeting](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-05-new-location-catalog.md): Introducing a searchable locations catalog endpoint to easily find location IDs for precise geographic targeting in job and company searches
- [New `job_description_contains_not` filter](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-08-new-filter-job-description-contains-not-in-job-search.md): Filter out unwanted jobs by excluding specific words or phrases from job descriptions using whole-word matching and smart case handling in the Jobs Search endpoint
- [New required filters for job search by company](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-08-new-required-filter-job-search.md): Search for jobs by company domain or LinkedIn URL without date filters using the new company_domain_or and company_linkedin_url_or required filter options in the Jobs Search endpoint
- [Improved seniority parsing for VP and Staff roles](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-09-12-improved-seniority-parsing.md): Seniority classification now correctly handles Vice President roles as Senior level and limits Staff seniority to explicit IC positions like Staff Engineer, fixing misclassifications
- [Update to blur_company_data for single company queries](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-10-06-blur-company-data-update.md): Starting October 2025, blur_company_data no longer reduces credit costs when filtering by a single company, helping maintain sustainable low pricing across the platform
- [General improvements to the job search endpoint](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-10-22-performance-improvements.md): Major performance improvements across the platform including 3x faster job searches, 2x faster webhooks and technographics queries, and 25% faster company technology filtering
- [Free Plan Update](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-10-23-free-plan-update.md): Updated free plan now includes 50 company credits and 200 API credits per month, with up to 5 pages of search results and 25 results per page at 2 requests per second
- [Clay Integration](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-10-24-clay-integration.md): TheirStack Jobs Data is now available as an integration in Clay, giving you access to real-time job posting data directly within your GTM workflows and enrichment tables
- [New AI and enterprise technologies](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-10-31-new-technologies.md): Expansion of technology detection across AI platforms, data science tools, supply chain solutions, tag management systems, and enterprise software
- [New columns when exporting jobs](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-11-03-job-export-new-columns.md): Job exports now include employment status and seniority level columns in CSV and Excel formats, helping you filter and analyze positions by type and experience level
- [Rate Limit Headers](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-11-03-rate-limit.md): API responses now include rate limit headers showing remaining requests, reset times, and applied policies, making it easier to monitor usage and manage your integrations
- [Fill Rate Metrics](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-11-10-fill-rate.md): View real-time fill rate percentages for every field across Job, Company, Technographic, and Technology entities, showing what percentage of records have data for each attribute
- [Jobs and Companies Statistics Pages](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-11-10-job-company-statistics.md): New statistics pages for Jobs and Companies with monthly totals, breakdowns by country, source, workplace type, industry, employee size, and headquarters location.
- [Smarter company matching using multiple data points](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-11-17-company-matching.md): We've enhanced our company matching algorithm to accurately associate jobs with companies, even when multiple companies share the same name.
- [Job location filtering - 20% fewer false matches](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-12-18-location-or-filter-false-positives-reduced.md): The job_location_or filter (New Job Location filter in the UI) now has significantly fewer false positives, providing more accurate location-based job search results
- [Full locations catalog - over 4.2M locations](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2025-12-19-expanded-location-catalog.md): The locations catalog endpoint now supports searching through the complete catalog of over 4.2M locations, expanded from the previous 250k limit
- [New AI and accounting technologies](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-01-15-new-technologies.md): 24 new technologies added to our detection system, expanding coverage across AI models like DeepSeek and Llama, accounting software, meeting and collaboration tools, and development platforms
- [Increased amount of discovered jobs](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-01-19-increased-daily-jobs-discovery.md): We've significantly increased the number of daily jobs in our system by scaling our discovery agents and enhancing our job discovery strategy to capture more job types than ever before.
- [Search within your Company Lists](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-02-search-within-company-lists.md): New "Add filter" button lets you apply job title, description, and technology filters to your saved company lists, so you can search within lists and export enriched results
- [Favourite Technologies](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-11-favourite-technologies.md): Star the technologies you care about so they always appear first in company profiles and search filters, letting you instantly check if any company uses the tools you track
- [Excluding recruiting agencies from technology signals](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-13-exclude-recruiting-agencies-technology-signals.md): We now automatically exclude recruiting agencies, staffing companies, and similar firms from technology signals to ensure you only see signals from direct employers.
- [MCP Server: Connect AI assistants to TheirStack](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-13-mcp-server.md): Connect AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, or ChatGPT to TheirStack via the Model Context Protocol to search jobs, find companies, and explore tech stacks using natural language
- [New sales and marketing technologies](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-17-new-technologies.md): 25 new technologies added to our detection system, expanding coverage across sales tools, marketing and growth platforms, finance and billing software, and developer infrastructure
- [New Support Center](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-02-25-support-center.md): New in-app Support Center lets you request technology keywords, report bugs, request features, and share feedback with guided forms, screenshot attachments, and ticket tracking
- [New API keys section and workspace-wide management](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-03-04-api-keys-section.md): Discover how TheirStack's new API keys section lets you set expiration dates, revoke compromised keys, and manage all workspace access from one screen.
- [Workspaces have arrived at TheirStack](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-03-04-workspace-switcher.md): Discover how TheirStack workspaces let you switch contexts in one click, separate lists and searches per team, and manage up to 5 workspaces.
- [Improved source filter with multi-source matching](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-03-06-improved-source-filter.md): The Job source filter (previously called `URL domain`) now matches jobs by both their career page URL and job board URL, and shows job counts per source in suggestions.
- [Webhook signing secrets for payload verification](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-03-27-webhook-signing-secret.md): Secure your webhook integrations with HMAC-SHA256 signing secrets. Every delivery includes a signature header so your endpoint can verify the payload came from TheirStack.
- [Actions menu on saved search detail pages](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-06-saved-search-actions-menu.md): Archive, duplicate, or manage alerts directly from any saved search detail page without navigating back to the home screen. The same actions from the list are now one click away.
- [Know who's ready to buy: buying intent detection is live](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-07-buying-intent-topics.md): Buying intent data is now in TheirStack. Stop prospecting cold lists and focus sales on companies actively investing in what you sell.
- [Hourly job datasets](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-07-hourly-job-datasets.md): Job posting datasets are now available with hourly granularity — get fresher hiring signals with data partitioned by hour, same Parquet format and API.
- [New job description filter: match all regex patterns](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-16-job-description-and-patterns.md): You can now require multiple regex patterns to all appear in a job description, so you can build precise multi-condition searches without combinatorial regex.
- [New job description filter: exclude keywords](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-16-job-description-negative-filter.md): You can now filter out jobs whose descriptions mention certain keywords, so you can remove noise like "intern", "junior", or "entry level" from any search.
- [Job description regex filters are now case-sensitive](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-21-job-description-case-sensitive-regex.md): Regex patterns in job description filters now match case-sensitively by default. Add (?i) at the start of any pattern to restore case-insensitive matching.
- [New filter: Seniority Level](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-21-seniority-level-filter.md): Filter job postings by seniority level (Junior, Mid-level, Senior, Staff, C-level) in the app and the API. Find entry-level or senior positions without scanning descriptions.
- [Company Enrichment: technologies and intents](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-04-21-tech-stack-enrichment-redesign.md): The enrichment page now supports both technologies and buying intent topics, with a guided flow that lets you choose what to enrich first, then provide companies via CSV upload or manual input.
- [Find people on Instantly.ai](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-05-instantly-find-people.md): You can now find people on Instantly.ai directly from TheirStack — select companies, click Find People, and Instantly opens with the right domains and titles pre-filled.
- [New API page: monitor your usage at a glance](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-08-api-page.md): A new "API" section in the sidebar shows your request volume over time, your most recent requests, and the most popular endpoints with example use cases.
- [New MCP page: connect TheirStack to AI clients](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-08-mcp-page.md): A new in-app MCP page with copy-paste install snippets for 9 AI clients and example prompts you can drop straight into your assistant.
- [New Use Cases page: ready-to-run examples](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-08-use-cases-gallery.md): A new Use Cases gallery with filterable cards showing concrete examples — buying intent topics, logo-detection setups, and more — that you can open as a search in one click.
- [New Webhooks page: see at a glance which ones are firing](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-08-webhooks-page-redesign.md): The Webhooks page now shows your webhook list side-by-side with an executions chart grouped by webhook, plus filters by status and team member.
- [Now you can rerun any export's search in one click](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-11-see-search-on-exports.md): Every row in Export History has a new "See search" button that reopens the search with the exact filters used for that export — so you can inspect them and re-run or refine the query without rebuilding it.
- [Export company searches for LinkedIn Audiences](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-13-linkedin-audiences-csv-export.md): Export company search results as a LinkedIn Audiences CSV, with the columns LinkedIn expects for company list uploads in Campaign Manager.
- [Better Company Type filtering](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-14-better-direct-employer-filtering.md): TheirStack now helps Company Search return more end customers and fewer staffing, recruiting, or other hiring intermediaries when you select the Direct Employer company type.
- [You can now filter jobs by region, county, or metro area](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-14-region-county-metro-filter-fix.md): 55 million jobs that were silently missing from region, county and metro filters are now discoverable. If you've ever filtered jobs by Greater London, Los Angeles County or Tokyo and got back a suspiciously small number — that's fixed.
- [MCP now accepts API key auth — no more daily re-logins](https://theirstack.com/en/product-updates/2026-05-22-mcp-api-key-auth.md): Authenticate to TheirStack's MCP with an API key instead of OAuth so the connection never expires and your AI client stops asking you to re-log in.

## Comparisons

- [TheirStack vs 6sense](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-6sense.md): Compare TheirStack and 6sense for technographic and intent data. While 6sense is an enterprise ABM platform at $50K+/year, TheirStack delivers self-serve technographic intelligence and hiring intent signals with transparent pricing from $59/month. Find which tool fits your needs.
- [TheirStack vs Bombora](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-bombora.md): Compare TheirStack and Bombora for B2B buying intent. Bombora delivers Company Surge topic intent from a large B2B data co-op; TheirStack surfaces hiring-based intent and technographics traceable to real job postings. See how they differ and when to use each.
- [TheirStack vs BrightData](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-brightdata.md): Looking for the best job data solution? Compare TheirStack and BrightData side by side. While BrightData offers basic job scraping for platforms like LinkedIn and Indeed, TheirStack provides a comprehensive, real-time job data platform with advanced filtering, instant results, and seamless integration. Discover which solution best fits your needs in this detailed comparison guide.
- [TheirStack vs BuiltWith](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-builtwith.md): Compare TheirStack and BuiltWith to find the best technographic database for your needs. Learn how TheirStack offers broader technology coverage, real-time webhooks, and confidence scoring, while BuiltWith specializes in web technology tracking.
- [TheirStack vs Coresignal](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-coresignal.md): Compare TheirStack and Coresignal to find the best job data solution. While Coresignal offers extensive datasets and APIs for company, employee, and job data, TheirStack provides a comprehensive, real-time job data platform with advanced filtering, instant results, and seamless integration. Discover which solution best fits your needs in this detailed comparison guide.
- [TheirStack vs Enlyft](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-enlyft.md): Compare TheirStack and Enlyft for technographic data. While Enlyft is an enterprise technology intelligence platform with no self-serve access, TheirStack provides real-time technographic data and job intelligence with transparent pricing from $59/month. See which fits your needs.
- [TheirStack vs FantasticJobs](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-fantasticjobs.md): Compare TheirStack and FantasticJobs side by side to find the best job data solution for your business — covering features, pricing, data quality, and API capabilities.
- [TheirStack vs HG Insights](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-hginsights.md): Looking for the best way to work with job data? Compare TheirStack and HG Insights side by side. While HG Insights is an enterprise market-intelligence and technographics platform with sales-led pricing and access, TheirStack provides a self-serve, real-time job data platform with advanced filtering, instant results, and a developer-friendly API. See which solution fits your use case in this practical comparison.
- [TheirStack vs PredictLeads](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-predictleads.md): Compare TheirStack and PredictLeads to find the best solution for your business needs. TheirStack offers a real-time job data platform, while PredictLeads provides comprehensive company intelligence data. Discover which solution best fits your needs in this detailed comparison guide.
- [TheirStack vs Similarweb](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-similarweb.md): Compare TheirStack and Similarweb to find the best solution for your needs. Learn how TheirStack offers technographic data and real-time webhooks, while SimilarWeb specializes in web traffic and market intelligence.
- [TheirStack vs Sumble](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-sumble.md): TheirStack and Sumble are very similar products, but with big differences in pricing, volume, freshness and go-to-market strategy. This is an unbiased comparison of the two products.
- [TheirStack vs ThomsonData](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-thomsondata.md): Compare TheirStack and ThomsonData for technology intelligence. While ThomsonData sells static B2B data lists, TheirStack provides real-time technographic data and job intelligence via a self-serve API. See which approach fits your needs.
- [TheirStack vs Wappalyzer](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-wappalyzer.md): Compare TheirStack and Wappalyzer to find the best solution for your needs. Learn how TheirStack offers technographic data and real-time webhooks, while Wappalyzer specializes in website technology profiling.
- [TheirStack vs ZoomInfo](https://theirstack.com/en/comparisons/theirstack-vs-zoominfo.md): Compare TheirStack and ZoomInfo for technographic and job data. While ZoomInfo is an all-in-one B2B sales platform starting at $15K+/year, TheirStack provides self-serve, real-time job data and technographic intelligence with transparent pricing from $59/month. See which solution fits your use case.

## Alternatives

- [Best 6sense Alternatives in 2026](https://theirstack.com/en/alternatives/6sense-alternatives.md): Looking for a 6sense alternative? Compare the best technographic and intent data platforms — including TheirStack, ZoomInfo, Enlyft, and more — to find the right fit for your ABM, sales, or data needs without $50K+/year enterprise contracts.
- [Best Bombora Alternatives in 2026](https://theirstack.com/en/alternatives/bombora-alternatives.md): Looking for a Bombora alternative or complement? Compare intent and go-to-market data platforms — including TheirStack, 6sense, Demandbase, and ZoomInfo — with a focus on buying intent, signal transparency, and self-serve access.
- [Best BuiltWith Alternatives in 2026](https://theirstack.com/en/alternatives/builtwith-alternatives.md): Looking for a BuiltWith alternative? Compare the best technographic data platforms — including TheirStack, Wappalyzer, HG Insights, and more — to find the right fit for your sales, marketing, or market research needs.
- [Best Coresignal Alternatives in 2026](https://theirstack.com/en/alternatives/coresignal-alternatives.md): Exploring alternatives to Coresignal for job data and company intelligence? Compare TheirStack, PredictLeads, and other providers to find the best fit for your data needs.
